mapper.select: select mainClassifyCH, primaryName, secondaryName, tableCount, IFNULL(yesterdayRecordsSum, 0) as yesterdayRecordsSum, IFNULL(allRecordsSum, 0) as allRecordsSum, primarycodeid, secondarycodeid as secondaryClassifyCode from (select mainClassifyCH, primaryName, secondaryName, COUNT(CONCAT(TABLE_PROJECT, TABLE_NAME_EN)) as tableCount, case when SUM(YESTERDAY_COUNT) is null then 0 else SUM(YESTERDAY_COUNT) end as yesterdayRecordsSum, case when SUM(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) is null then 0 else SUM(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) end as allRecordsSum, primarycodeid, secondarycodeid from (select distinct SECONDARY_NAME as secondaryName, PRIMARY_NAME as primaryName, MAJOR_CLASS as mainClassifyCH, primarycodeid, secondarycodeid from (select a3.PRIMARY_NAME, a3.primarycodeid, a3.DEL_FLAG, a3.MAJOR_CLASS, a3.SECONDARY_NAME, a3.last_level_classifycode as secondarycodeid from (select a1.PRIMARY_NAME, a1.SECONDARY_NAME, a1.DEL_FLAG, a1.MAJOR_CLASS, a2.CODEID as primarycodeid, a1.last_level_classifycode from DP_FOCUS_CLASS_MONITOR a1 left join V_CLASSIFY_INFO a2 on a1.PRIMARY_NAME collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci = a2.CODETEXT collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci) a3) k where (k.MAJOR_CLASS = '数据组织分类' or k.MAJOR_CLASS = '原始库') and k.DEL_FLAG = 0) f1 left join (select PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, TABLE_ALL_COUNT, YESTERDAY_COUNT, TABLE_NAME_EN, TABLE_PROJECT from (select case when t.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '原始库' then t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH else t.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH end as PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, case when t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH like '%汇聚库%' or t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH like '%汇集库%' or t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH like '%标准库%' then t.THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH else t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH end as SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, t.TABLE_ALL_COUNT, t.YESTERDAY_COUNT, t.TABLE_NAME_EN, t.TABLE_PROJECT, row_number() over(partition by LOWER(TABLE_TYPE), TABLE_PROJECT, TABLE_NAME_EN order by STATISTICS_TIME desc) as rn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS t where t.STATISTICS_TIME >= date(NOW())) t1 where t1.rn = 1) t1 on t1.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = f1.primaryName and (t1.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = f1.secondaryName or (t1.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH is null and f1.secondaryName is null)) group by mainClassifyCH, primaryName, secondaryName, primarycodeid, secondarycodeid order by primarycodeid, secondarycodeid) as sub1 union all select mainClassifyCH, primaryName, secondaryName, tableCount, IFNULL(yesterdayRecordsSum, 0) as yesterdayRecordsSum, IFNULL(allRecordsSum, 0) as allRecordsSum, primarycodeid, secondarycodeid as secondaryClassifyCode from (select mainClassifyCH, primaryName, secondaryName, COUNT(CONCAT(TABLE_PROJECT, TABLE_NAME_EN)) as tableCount, case when SUM(YESTERDAY_COUNT) is null then 0 else SUM(YESTERDAY_COUNT) end as yesterdayRecordsSum, case when SUM(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) is null then 0 else SUM(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) end as allRecordsSum, primarycodeid, secondarycodeid from (select distinct SECONDARY_NAME as secondaryName, PRIMARY_NAME as primaryName, MAJOR_CLASS as mainClassifyCH, primarycodeid, secondarycodeid from (select b3.PRIMARY_NAME, b3.primarycodeid, b3.DEL_FLAG, b3.MAJOR_CLASS, b3.SECONDARY_NAME, b3.last_level_classifycode as secondarycodeid from (select b1.PRIMARY_NAME, b1.SECONDARY_NAME, b1.DEL_FLAG, b1.MAJOR_CLASS, b2.CODEID as primarycodeid, b1.last_level_classifycode from DP_FOCUS_CLASS_MONITOR b1 left join V_CLASSIFY_INFO b2 on b1.PRIMARY_NAME COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = b2.CODETEXT COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci) b3) j where j.MAJOR_CLASS = '数据来源分类' and j.DEL_FLAG = 0) f2 left join (select PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH, SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH, TABLE_ALL_COUNT, YESTERDAY_COUNT, TABLE_NAME_EN, TABLE_PROJECT from (select t.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH, t.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH, t.TABLE_ALL_COUNT, t.YESTERDAY_COUNT, t.TABLE_NAME_EN, t.TABLE_PROJECT, row_number() over(partition by LOWER(TABLE_TYPE), TABLE_PROJECT, TABLE_NAME_EN order by STATISTICS_TIME desc) as rn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS t where t.STATISTICS_TIME >= date(NOW())) t2 where t2.rn = 1) t2 on t2.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH = f2.primaryName and (t2.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH = f2.secondaryName or (t2.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH is null and f2.secondaryName is null)) group by mainClassifyCH, primaryName, secondaryName, primarycodeid, secondarycodeid order by primarycodeid, secondarycodeid) as sub2;

select distinct d.major_class as mainClassifyCH, primaryClassifyCode, d.primary_name as primaryClassifyCH, case when SECONDARYCLASSIFYCODE is null then d.last_level_classifycode else SECONDARYCLASSIFYCODE end as SECONDARYCLASSIFYCODE, d.secondary_name as SECONDARYCLASSIFYCH, 1 as alreadyInserted from DP_FOCUS_CLASS_MONITOR d left join (select * from (select '数据组织分类' as mainClassifyCH, CODEID as primaryClassifyCode, CODETEXT as primaryClassifyCH from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = #{sjzzflCodeId} union all select '数据来源分类' as mainClassifyCH, CODEID as primaryClassifyCode, CODETEXT as primaryClassifyCH from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000404') a INNER join (select CODEID as SECONDARYCLASSIFYCODE, CODETEXT as SECONDARYCLASSIFYCH, PARCODEID from V_CLASSIFY_INFO) b on a.PRIMARYCLASSIFYCODE = b.PARCODEID) c on d.major_class COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = c.mainClassifyCH COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci and d.primary_name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = c.primaryClassifyCH COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci and d.secondary_name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = c.SECONDARYCLASSIFYCH COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
select primary_name||'_'||SECONDARY_NAME as secondaryClassifyCH from DP_FOCUS_CLASS_MONITOR
mapper.insert:
insert into DP_FOCUS_CLASS_MONITOR (PRIMARY_NAME , SECONDARY_NAME , INSERT_TIME , DEL_FLAG,MAJOR_CLASS,USER_ID,USER_AUTHORITY_ID,USER_NAME,IS_ADMIN,LAST_LEVEL_CLASSIFYCODE) values
(#{item.primaryClassifyCH,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.secondaryClassifyCH,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'),0,#{item.mainClassifyCH,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.userAuthorityId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.isAdmin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.secondaryClassifyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: DELETE from USER_AUTHORITY where MODULECODE='ZCGL_ZDZZ' and USERID=#{userId}
mapper.select: select TABLENAMEZH, TOTAL from (select name as TABLENAMEZH, tableen as tablenameen, sum(TABLEUSECOUNTOFDAY) as TOTAL, tabletype from (select a.tableen, a.tabletype, a.TABLEUSECOUNTOFDAY, toa.NAME, toa.table_project from (select b.tabletype, b.TABLEUSECOUNTOFDAY, substr(b.tablenameen, 0, instr(b.tablenameen, '.') - 1) as tableproject, substr(b.tablenameen, instr(b.tablenameen, '.') + 1) as tableen from (select scuh.* from DP_STORECYCLEANDUSEHEAT scuh inner join synlte.object o on upper(substr(scuh.tablenameen, instr(scuh.tablenameen, '.') + 1)) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = upper(o.tablename) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci where o.objectstate = 1 and o.relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD') b) a inner join DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS toa on upper(a.tableen) = upper(toa.table_name_en) and upper(a.tableproject) = upper(toa.table_project) where toa.statistics_time >= date_sub(date(NOW()), interval #{daysAgo} day) and toa.name is not null ) t1 group by name, tableen, tabletype, table_project order by TOTAL desc) t2 limit 9

SELECT CASE WHEN NAME IS NULL THEN TABLENAME ELSE NAME END AS TABLENAMEZH, ROUND(TABLE_ALL_COUNT / 100000000, 4) AS total, tableType FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(TABLE_PROJECT, '.', TABLE_NAME_EN) AS TABLENAME, NAME, TABLE_ALL_COUNT, TABLE_TYPE AS tableType FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS a LEFT JOIN synlte.object b ON a.sjxjbm COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = b.tableid COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE a.STATISTICS_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL #{daysAgo} DAY) AND a.SJXJBM IS NOT NULL AND b.objectstate = 1 ORDER BY TABLE_ALL_COUNT DESC, NAME IS NULL DESC ) AS sub LIMIT 6;

SELECT CASE WHEN NAME IS NULL THEN TABLENAME ELSE NAME END AS TABLENAMEZH, ROUND(YESTERDAY_COUNT / 100000000, 4) AS total, tableType FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(TABLE_PROJECT, '.', TABLE_NAME_EN) AS TABLENAME, NAME, YESTERDAY_COUNT, TABLE_TYPE AS tableType FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS a LEFT JOIN synlte.object b ON a.sjxjbm COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = b.tableid COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE a.STATISTICS_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL #{daysAgo} DAY) AND a.PARTITION_MESSAGE = 0 AND a.SJXJBM IS NOT NULL AND b.objectstate = 1 ORDER BY YESTERDAY_COUNT DESC, YESTERDAY_COUNT IS NULL DESC ) AS sub LIMIT 6;

select CODETEXT as PRIMARY_CH,'数据组织分类' as MAINCLASS_CH from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'JZCODEGASJZZFL' UNION ALL select CODETEXT as PRIMARY_CH,'数据来源分类' as MAINCLASS_CH from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000404'
